_description: Per-ticker technical indicator weights for VedicAlpha. 1.0 = standard contribution, 0.0 = disabled, 2.0 = double weight. Updated automatically by: python3 run_backtest.py --update-indicator-weights. Edit manually to override.

_indicators.supertrend: Supertrend ATR-based trend filter (7-period, 3× mult) — popular on NSE/MCX
_indicators.VIX: India VIX — fetched live from NSE via nsepython
_indicators.PCR: NSE Put-Call Ratio — simulated for index/equity only (0.6 until live feed restored)
_indicators.gold_silver_ratio: Gold:Silver ratio — only active for gold/silver categories
_indicators.candle: Candlestick pattern detection (9 patterns: Morning Star, Engulfing, Hammer etc.)
_indicators.pivot: Pivot points (P, R1, R2, S1, S2) — floor/ceiling signals
_indicators.SP500: S&P 500 previous-day return — global cue for NIFTY/BSE (equity/index only)

_default._note: Applied when no ticker-specific entry exists. PCR is 0.6 because it uses simulated data. SP500 is 0.4 — meaningful but secondary to domestic signals.

_note_on_backtest: run_backtest.py --update-indicator-weights computes 2-year per-indicator accuracy for each ticker, then sets weights proportional to lift above 33.3% baseline. Indicators at/below baseline get weight 0.2 (not 0 — sample may be too short). Indicators 10pp+ above baseline get weight 1.5-2.0.
